items.text: Could you help me close this?
Put your bag on the scale
I'd like to check this bag, please.
How many kilos am I allowed?
Put your bag on the belt
I'll take off my shoes now.
Is there anything else I need to remove?
items.hint: 还有什么需要我取出来的吗？

items.text: Put your bag in the overhead
Excuse me, may I get past?
items.hint: 打扰一下，我可以过去吗？

items.text: Would you like chicken or fish?
May I have some water, please?
I'd like the chicken, thank you.
I can see the city below!
items.hint: 我能看到下面的城市了！

items.text: Look at all the new buildings!
I can't wait to explore this city!
items.hint: 我迫不及待想探索这座城市！

items.text: May I have a key card, please?
Which floor is the restaurant on?
I can see the whole city!
Look at the pictures in the menu
Ask the waiter for a suggestion
What would you like to eat?
Could I see the menu, please?
items.hint: 请给我看一下菜单好吗？

items.text: Point to the flavor you want
Can I have the chocolate flavor?
items.hint: 我可以要巧克力口味吗？

items.text: Hold your fork in your left hand
Put your napkin on your lap
I'm trying to use a fork!
Be brave and try something new
This is the most delicious food ever!
items.hint: 这是我吃过最好吃的食物！

items.text: Could you help me find my hotel?
items.hint: 你能帮我找到我的酒店吗？

items.text: I'd like to buy this, please.
Write a message to your friend
Draw a little picture on it
Don't forget to add a stamp
I'm sending this from a new city!
items.hint: 我从一座新城市寄出这张卡！

items.text: Hold on tight when it moves
Can we sit on the top deck?
The view from up here is amazing!

items.hint: 这件文物有多少年历史了？

items.text: I want to learn more about it!
Don't go too deep in the sea
The sand is soft and warm!

items.hint: 我找到了一个漂亮的贝壳！

items.text: Hold the edge and look down
Look! The houses are so small!
Stand in front and take a photo
Tell me what you know about it
It's so tall! I can't believe it!
I've always wanted to see this!
Strike a pose for the photo
I love dressing up in costumes!
Count the stars in the sky
This campfire makes me feel so cozy!
Tell a story about each photo

items.hint: 每张照片都有一个故事。

items.text: Give your friend a big hug
items.hint: 给你的朋友一个大大的抱抱

items.text: Wave goodbye with a big smile
items.hint: 带着大大的微笑挥手道别

items.text: I hope we meet again someday!
items.hint: 希望我们有一天能再相见！

items.text: Draw a picture of what you saw

items.hint: 这真是一次精彩的旅行！

items.text: I can't wait for my next adventure!
items.hint: 我迫不及待想要下一次冒险！
